entry.title: New: CR 24-95 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 24-157, CD1, to accept a 45.415-acre parcel from the State of Hawai‛i, in Hāna, Maui, Hawai‛i, tax map key (2) 1-3-006:017, set aside by Executive Order 4708, for the expansion of Hāna Landfill.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
